NSCameraUsageDescription: LocoSnap needs camera access to take photos of trains for identification.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LocoSnap needs photo library access to select train photos for identification.
NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: LocoSnap saves your train cards to your photo library.
NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: LocoSnap uses your location to record where you spotted each train, so you can see your sightings on a map.
